Records.authors: Johannes M. Henn, Kirill Melnikov, Vladimir A. Smirnov
Records.description: The authors compute all two-loop planar master integrals needed for the computation of the production of off-shell vector bosons in hadron collisions. The arXiv contains files with all these integrals, while the definitions and prefactors are given in the paper in Sect. 7. The $\varepsilon$ expansion is given in terms of multiple polylogarithms of uniform weight through to weight four.

Records.authors: Thomas Gehrmann, Andreas von Manteuffel, Lorenzo Tancredi, Erich Weihs
Records.description: The authors compute the full set of massless two-loop four-point functions with two off-shell legs with the same invariant mass relevant for diboson production at hadron colliders ($q\bar{q}\to VV$ and $gg\to VV$). The $\varepsilon$ expansion is given in terms of multiple polylogarithms of uniform weight through to weight four. Results for physical scattering kinematics are optimized for numerical evaluations using $\operatorname{Li}_{2,2}$, $\operatorname{Li}_n$ and $\log$ functions. In addition, expansions are provided at the production threshold and in the small mass limit.

Results.resultTeXPreview: \frac{M_3^{-2} \left(2 H\left(\frac{1}{1-M_2^2 M_3^{-2}},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-4 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(\frac{1}{1-M_2^2 M_3^{-2}},\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+4 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+2 \log \left(M_1^2 M_2^{-2}\right) \log \left(-W_1^-\right)+\log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)-2 \log \left(M_1^2 M_2^{-2}\right) \log \left(-W_1^+\right)-\log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)\right)}{2 \varepsilon \left(W_1^--W_1^+\right)} + \cdots
